'''âl-t-s''' ('''latasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrilateralize|quadrilateralize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrilateralize|quadrilateralize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-t-s
|-
! Lemma
| latasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:latasithi|latasithi]] || [[word:latasiji|latasiji]] || [[word:latasishi|latasishi]] || [[word:latasi|latasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:latasuthuth|latasuthuth]] || [[word:latasujuj|latasujuj]] || [[word:latasushush|latasushush]] || [[word:latas|latas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:latasuthu|latasuthu]] || [[word:latasuju|latasuju]] || [[word:latasushu|latasushu]] || [[word:latasu|latasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:latasufuth|latasufuth]] || [[word:latasufuj|latasufuj]] || [[word:latasufush|latasufush]] || [[word:latasuf|latasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:latasethe|latasethe]] || [[word:lataseje|lataseje]] || [[word:lataseshe|lataseshe]] || [[word:latase|latase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:latasothoth|latasothoth]] || [[word:latasojoj|latasojoj]] || [[word:latasoshosh|latasoshosh]] || [[word:latas|latas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:latasotho|latasotho]] || [[word:latasojo|latasojo]] || [[word:latasosho|latasosho]] || [[word:lataso|lataso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:latasofoth|latasofoth]] || [[word:latasofoj|latasofoj]] || [[word:latasofosh|latasofosh]] || [[word:latasof|latasof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:latasĂŻfĂŻf|latasĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻfĂŻf|latasĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻfĂŻf|latasĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻfĂŻf|latasĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]] || [[word:latasĂŻf|latasĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:latasĂŠthĂŠ|latasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:latasĂŠjĂŠ|latasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:latasĂŠshĂŠ|latasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:latasĂŠ|latasĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:latasathath|latasathath]] || [[word:latasajaj|latasajaj]] || [[word:latasashash|latasashash]] || [[word:latas|latas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:latasatha|latasatha]] || [[word:latasaja|latasaja]] || [[word:latasasha|latasasha]] || [[word:latasa|latasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:latasafath|latasafath]] || [[word:latasafaj|latasafaj]] || [[word:latasafash|latasafash]] || [[word:latasaf|latasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:latasasha|latasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golatasasha|golatasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilatasasha|gokilatasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:latasnĂŒsha|latasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golatasnknĂŒsha|golatasnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilatasnĂŒsha|gokilatasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:latasshĂ«sha|latasshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golatasnkshĂ«sha|golatasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilatasshĂ«sha|gokilatasshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:latasrosha|latasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golatasnkrosha|golatasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilatasrosha|gokilatasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:latasmusha|latasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golatasnkmusha|golatasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilatasmusha|gokilatasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:latassherasha|latassherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golatasnksherasha|golatasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilatassherasha|gokilatassherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:latasngasha|latasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golatasnkngasha|golatasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilatasngasha|gokilatasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:latasyasha|latasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golatasnkyasha|golatasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilatasyasha|gokilatasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:latasyamasha|latasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golatasnkyamasha|golatasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilatasyamasha|gokilatasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:latasnĂŒshĂ«sha|latasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golatasnknĂŒshĂ«sha|golatasnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilatasnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokilatasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:latasnĂŒrosha|latasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golatasnknĂŒrosha|golatasnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilatasnĂŒrosha|gokilatasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:latasnĂŒmusha|latasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golatasnknĂŒmusha|golatasnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilatasnĂŒmusha|gokilatasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:latasshĂ«nĂŒsha|latasshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golatasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|golatasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilatasshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokilatasshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:latasshĂ«rosha|latasshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golatasnkshĂ«rosha|golatasnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilatasshĂ«rosha|gokilatasshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:latasshĂ«musha|latasshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golatasnkshĂ«musha|golatasnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilatasshĂ«musha|gokilatasshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:latasronĂŒsha|latasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golatasnkronĂŒsha|golatasnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilatasronĂŒsha|gokilatasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:latasroshĂ«sha|latasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golatasnkroshĂ«sha|golatasnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilatasroshĂ«sha|gokilatasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:latasromusha|latasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golatasnkromusha|golatasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilatasromusha|gokilatasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:latasmunĂŒsha|latasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golatasnkmunĂŒsha|golatasnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilatasmunĂŒsha|gokilatasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:latasmushĂ«sha|latasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golatasnkmushĂ«sha|golatasnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilatasmushĂ«sha|gokilatasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:latasmurosha|latasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golatasnkmurosha|golatasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilatasmurosha|gokilatasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:latas|latas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lĂŠtĂŠs|lĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holatas|holatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holĂŠtĂŠs|holĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholatas|hoholatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholĂŠtĂŠs|hoholĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒlatas|nĂŒlatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒlĂŠtĂŠs|nĂŒlĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlatas|nĂŒnĂŒlatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠtĂŠs|nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻlatas|nĂŻlatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻlĂŠtĂŠs|nĂŻlĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlatas|nĂŻnĂŻlatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠtĂŠs|nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulatas|lulatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulĂŠtĂŠs|lulĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululatas|lululatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululĂŠtĂŠs|lululĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilatas|lilatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilĂŠtĂŠs|lilĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililatas|lililatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililĂŠtĂŠs|lililĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolatas|kolatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolĂŠtĂŠs|kolĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolatas|kokolatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolĂŠtĂŠs|kokolĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelatas|kelatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelĂŠtĂŠs|kelĂŠtĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelatas|kekelatas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelĂŠtĂŠs|kekelĂŠtĂŠs]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
